steps.t: Goldagnir is in Thangúlhad. You have been told to speak with Goldagnir about the details of the plan to strike the fortress of Dol Guldur.
Goldagnir is in Thangúlhad, waiting to begin the second stage of the assault upon Dol Guldur. You have participated in the skirmish at the gate of the…
Goldagnir is in Thangúlhad. You have participated in the second skirmish at Dol Guldur and should report to Goldagnir.
Ningloril is in Thangúlhad, the camp of the Golden Host in Gathbúrz. Ningloril has asked for you to come see her again about a secret errand.
